creator: ngie@FreeBSD.org
text:
Items where this is still an issue:
- databases/mysql57-client
- lang/php80*
- lang/ruby27

Items that have been removed from main (and thus, no longer issues):
- lang/php73*
- lang/php74*
- lang/python36

Also FWIW, I think enough time has passed since the last exp-run (10 months as of my writing this) that once the issues with the above items have been resolved, we should run another exp-run.
